AI 市场综述 ▼ 收起
【今日看点】 今天市场被恐慌情绪笼罩，三大美股指数全线下挫，纳斯达克跌得最狠，超过1.5%。最扎眼的是油价，WTI原油一天暴涨超过12%，冲到90美元以上，而黄金白银也跟着大涨。这明显是避险模式开启了，大家因为担心打仗，都在抛股票、买黄金和石油。 【三件大事】 1. 地缘政治：美伊紧张局势急剧升温 发生了啥？多条新闻显示，美国与伊朗的对抗升级。特朗普政府被曝计划武装库尔德力量在伊朗煽动起义，同时特朗普本人也强硬表态，市场认为美国军事打击伊朗的可能性很高。 关键数据：WTI原油价格单日暴涨12.21%，至每桶90.90美元。 2. 突发事件：伊朗核问题出现戏剧性转折 发生了啥？就在紧张关头，有突破性消息传出。据CBS报道，伊朗同意放弃所有浓缩铀库存并接受全面核查，以避免美国军事打击。这给紧张的局势带来了一丝和平的希望。 关键数据：此消息与军事威胁新闻几乎同时出现，造成了市场情绪的剧烈摇摆。 3. 市场情绪：恐慌指数飙升，资金涌入避险资产 发生了啥？面对战争不确定性，投资者集体转向避险。被称为“恐慌指数”的VIX单日暴涨24%，同时黄金、白银价格大幅上涨，而股市遭遇抛售。 关键数据：VIX指数报29.49，涨幅24.17%；黄金期货涨1.58%，白银期货涨2.59%。 【影响分析】 地缘冲突直接推高了油价和避险资产价格，增加了企业成本和通胀压力，这是股市下跌的直接推手。突发的外交消息（伊朗让步）带来了短期波动，但能否真正缓和局势还需观察，这构成了基本面上的巨大不确定性。情绪面上，VIX飙升清楚表明市场处于“恐惧”状态，资金从风险资产（股票）流出，转入黄金、国债等避险港。各类资产联动显示，这是一个典型的“风险规避”交易日。 【接下来怎么看】 未来几天市场会紧盯美伊局势的任何风吹草动。如果和平信号做实，油价和恐慌指数可能快速回落，股市有望反弹。关键要盯住油价的走势，它是情绪的晴雨表；股市方面，可以关注标普500能否在6700点附近稳住。最大的风险依然是局势意外恶化，或者利好新闻被证伪，那可能引发新一轮避险抛售。

新闻简报 12 个主题 按主题聚合 ▼ 收起
系统性/市场结构风险 4 条
▼
美国法院驳回预测市场公司关于联邦监管优先的论点，意味着相关创新金融产品在州层面面临更严格的博彩法审查，其业务拓展的法律不确定性显著增加。与此同时，韩国KOSDAQ指数因暴跌8%触发熔断，显示特定市场出现了严重的流动性危机和恐慌性抛售。这两件事分别从监管环境和市场情绪两个维度揭示了当前金融市场的结构性压力：一方面，监管框架的收紧可能抑制部分高风险领域的资本流动与创新活力；另一方面，关键市场的剧烈波动直接印证了避险情绪的急剧升温。两者共同指向市场风险偏好下降和波动性加剧的趋势。
判断为利空。（监管收紧与市场暴跌同步强化避险格局。）

▶ 原始来源（4 条）
风险偏好与波动 13 条
▼
当前市场正经历一场由地缘政治冲突触发的典型风险规避。美国对伊朗的军事行动直接导致比特币暴跌、亚洲股市下挫及油价飙升，VIX恐慌指数飙升至去年11月以来新高，清晰印证了市场恐慌情绪的急剧升温。投资者行为印证了达利欧所指出的“恐惧”模式，资金正从风险资产撤离。然而，市场并非单向崩溃，深层结构正在分化：一方面，内存市场崩溃等特定风险正在暴露；另一方面，资金在寻求传统避险资产时遭遇阻碍（如CME交易中断抑制白银），并部分转向了新型避险载体，Solana上代币化黄金交易量创纪录激增便是明证。这反映出布兰克费恩警告的“自满”心态正在被打破，市场开始重新定价风险，但工具和渠道已不同于以往。
综合判断：短期利空。（地缘冲突直接触发广泛风险资产抛售与恐慌指数飙升，市场避险模式主导。）

▶ 原始来源（13 条）
FOMC/美联储 14 条
▼
当前市场核心矛盾在于地缘冲突激化与美联储政策预期的交互影响。霍尔木兹海峡原油运输中断导致约2000万桶/日的供应受阻，直接推高全球能源成本。这一事实与美联储理事鲍曼的警告形成共振——她明确指出近期油价上涨可能加剧通胀压力，并暗示可能需要采取“更紧缩”的货币政策。与此同时，美联储在监管层面终止对富国银行的执法行动，并针对其他银行前雇员采取新行动，显示其在维护金融稳定与收紧监管之间的平衡。尽管有观点驳斥美元大幅贬值叙事，但地缘政治风险（如安理会相关动态）与供应链冲击构成的“滞胀”阴影正在积聚。美联储官员近期密集就流动性、通胀与金融稳定发表讲话，表明其政策天平正因外部冲击而向抗通胀一侧倾斜，货币环境趋紧的压力显著上升。
综合判断：利空。（地缘冲突推高能源价格与通胀预期，强化美联储紧缩立场，加剧市场对滞胀与紧缩的担忧。）

▶ 原始来源（14 条）
地缘与能源 165 条
▼
当前地缘紧张局势正成为能源市场的主导因素。美国总统特朗普对伊朗的军事行动与强硬言论，直接导致油价出现超过一周的最大单日涨幅，这清晰地反映了市场对供应中断风险的即时定价。尽管伊朗已同意放弃浓缩铀库存并接受核查，但美国同时计划武装库尔德力量、撤离人员，并警告可能对古巴进行“友好接管”，表明对抗与施压仍是政策主线，地缘风险溢价难以消退。另一方面，美国财政部向印度提供豁免并可能进一步解除对俄油制裁，旨在缓解供应缺口、平抑油价，这构成了市场的下行缓冲。综合来看，军事冲突的突发性与制裁政策的摇摆性，将使油价在紧张的基本面下维持高波动状态。
判断为利多。（地缘冲突风险溢价持续，且美国缓解供应的措施难以完全对冲突发军事行动带来的冲击。）

债券市场（国债/信用债） 7 条
▼
美国财政部即将进行的1830亿美元国债大规模拍卖，将直接增加国债市场的供给，对国债价格构成压力。与此同时，日本公共养老基金在国内债券收益率上升的背景下减持国内债券，显示主要机构投资者对当前收益率水平的认可，可能预示着全球范围内对更高收益率的追逐，这同样利空国债市场。另一方面，美国能源部向企业提供巨额贷款，以及加拿大与印度签署长期铀供应协议，均指向实体经济活动扩张与长期能源合作，可能提升市场风险偏好，部分资金可能从国债等避险资产流向信用债或权益市场。东京法院判决三菱UFJ金融集团子公司赔偿投资者AT1债券损失，这一事件凸显了特定信用债品种（如应急可转债）的风险，可能引发市场对类似债券的重新定价，短期内对部分信用债构成压力。
综合判断：利空。（大规模国债供给与机构行为共同施压债市。）

突发事件与监管 8 条
▼
市场信息显示，科技与地缘政治因素正共同塑造新的投资格局。英伟达凭借其网络产品线确立增长引擎，而黑石集团筹备数据中心上市工具，进一步印证了算力基础设施的长期价值。然而，特朗普政府拟议的AI芯片出口限制规定，为全球半导体供应链增添了不确定性，可能对部分厂商的海外业务构成潜在压力。与此同时，ASP Isotopes与大型能源公司签署的核能领域谅解备忘录，以及雇主广泛采用生成式AI进行招聘的趋势，分别指向了先进能源与人工智能应用端的实质性进展。地缘方面，关于古巴的言论可能扰动相关市场情绪，但具体政策路径尚不明确。
综合判断：中性偏多。（算力基建与AI应用趋势明确，但芯片出口管制带来短期不确定性。）

通胀/就业/GDP（CPI/PCE/NFP/PMI） 39 条
▼
当前市场正面临滞胀风险与地缘政治冲击的双重考验。核心矛盾在于，一方面美国经济数据呈现分化：强劲的GDP增长与低位的初请失业金人数显示经济韧性，但2月非农就业意外减少、零售销售疲软及制造业PMI下滑，又暴露出增长动能的隐忧。另一方面，通胀压力持续且来源复杂：PPI环比飙升、服务与商品成本因关税转嫁而上涨，叠加中东冲突升级可能引发的油价冲击（霍尔木兹海峡关闭风险），为通胀再度抬头埋下伏笔。这种“增长放缓迹象与顽固通胀风险”并存的格局，使得美联储的政策路径陷入两难，削弱了市场对降息的乐观预期。地缘冲突同时加剧了金融市场的避险情绪，对传统股债资产构成利空，但为黄金提供了结构性支撑，尽管其短期涨势可能因等待关键数据而暂停。
综合判断：利空风险资产（股市/债市），结构性利多黄金。（滞胀风险与政策两难压制风险偏好，地缘冲突强化黄金避险属性。）

宏观经济综合 13 条
▼
当前市场风险偏好正受到多重压力测试。地缘政治风险直接冲击市场情绪，伊朗局势升级导致纳斯克达克100指数期货大幅下挫，表明科技股对风险事件尤为敏感。与此同时，信用市场的结构性脆弱性正在暴露，私人信贷领域出现严重混乱，MFS案例揭示的抵押品再抵押问题，以及投资级科技债券利差走阔至全球金融危机以来高位，均指向流动性收紧与信用风险重估。微观层面，Lululemon因公司治理问题股价暴跌，韩国暂停程序化交易，均加剧了市场波动。尽管存在加州可能重启核能等长期结构性积极因素，但短期内市场叙事正被避险情绪主导，迈克尔·伯里对市场叙事的攻击与彼得·希夫对比特币高估值的警告，共同强化了市场对预期落空的担忧。
综合判断：利空。地缘冲突与信用风险共振，市场面临估值与流动性的双重压力。

美国政治与财政/贸易 42 条
▼
当前市场核心矛盾集中于美国贸易政策的高度不确定性及其连锁反应。特朗普政府威胁对中国征收100%关税，并宣称将切断与西班牙的所有贸易，这些言论虽具冲击力，但最高法院已裁定其不能以紧急权力作为实施全面全球关税的法律依据，这削弱了其单边行动的法定基础，并导致东南亚出口商因此重新调整战略。同时，美国海关与边境保护局宣布将建立系统处理非法关税退款，表明激进关税政策在实际执行层面面临纠错与缓冲。另一方面，美国国防部与OpenAI达成协议将AI用于军事，以及诺华公司因关税政策决定在美新建设施，显示特定领域在政策扰动下仍存在结构性资本流入。然而，参议员要求财政部单方面调整资本利得税、邮政总局现金储备可能耗尽、新泽西州面临结构性赤字等事实，均暴露美国财政管理与债务风险正在累积。综合来看，贸易保护主义言论制造短期波动与避险情绪，但其法律与执行约束、以及内部财政压力，将制约其长期烈度与范围，市场更可能呈现高波动下的区间震荡格局。
综合判断：中性。贸易风险与财政压力相互制衡，市场将进入高不确定性下的震荡观察期。

大宗商品（石油/铜/农产品） 11 条
▼
当前大宗商品市场，尤其是石油，正面临地缘政治风险溢价与供应端结构性支撑的双重驱动。美国-以色列与伊朗的冲突升级直接威胁波斯湾航运安全，而美国计划为通过霍尔木兹海峡的运输船提供军事保护和政治风险保险，恰恰印证了航道中断风险正在实质化，这构成了油价的即时上行压力。同时，美国财政部拟干预期货市场以平抑价格，表明政策层已感知到通胀压力，但其措施效果可能被持续的地缘冲突所抵消。另一方面，电力需求飙升与重型燃气轮机长达五年的扩产周期，揭示了能源基础设施的刚性瓶颈，这将长期支撑天然气等发电原料的需求。中国因尼日尔管道遇袭而提升戒备，凸显了全球供应链的脆弱性。尽管特朗普称油价“基本稳定”，但上述事实均指向供应体系的紧张态势正在累积。
综合判断：利多。（地缘冲突与供应链脆弱性推升风险溢价，而能源基础设施瓶颈提供长期支撑。）

贵金属（黄金/白银/铂金） 49 条
▼
当前贵金属市场正处于地缘政治风险与宏观经济数据激烈博弈的阶段。一方面，中东冲突升级及特朗普政府可能对伊朗采取军事行动的预期，持续为黄金提供避险买盘，推动金价创下历史最高周度与月度收盘价。另一方面，美元走强与美债收益率上升构成了短期压力，引发了市场的技术性抛售，导致金银价格出现剧烈波动。从深层驱动看，美国疲软的非农就业数据揭示了经济隐忧，而全球央行购金需求虽短期波动但长期趋势未改，加之铂金市场连续四年供应短缺，均从基本面构成支撑。市场分析师普遍认为当前黄金牛市仍处中期，机构预测仍有上行空间。尽管短期受美元压制出现回调，但地缘不确定性、债务问题及体系性风险（如布雷顿森林体系II面临压力）等核心利多因素并未消散。
综合判断：利多。地缘政治与体系性风险等核心驱动力未变，短期调整不改长期牛市基础。

其他 4 条
▼
中东地缘政治风险因以色列声称打击伊朗核设施而再度升温，这通常会在短期内推高传统能源价格并加剧市场避险情绪。然而，从能源结构转型的长期视角看，市场正经历深刻变革。中国电力需求持续增长，但燃煤发电量已出现显著下降，全部增量由核能与可再生能源承接，这清晰地印证了清洁能源对传统化石燃料的结构性替代趋势正在加速。与此同时，中国在加速器驱动次临界系统（ADS）这类先进核废料处理技术上取得进展，加之全球核聚变研究不断突破，预示着核能技术正朝着更安全、高效和可持续的方向演进。这些事实共同指向一个明确的市场方向：传统化石能源，特别是煤炭，在电力系统中的基本盘正受到不可逆的侵蚀，而包括先进核能在内的清洁能源产业链将长期受益于确定性的增长需求。
判断为利多（清洁能源及先进核能产业链）。（能源结构转型趋势确立，技术突破与需求增量共同构成长期支撑。）

地缘与能源Mills: Trump Admin "Reveling In The Carnage" As Tehran Burns
米尔斯：德黑兰动荡之际，特朗普政府“沉醉于杀戮狂欢”
ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 2026-03-07 06:20
AI 深度解读
ZeroHedge平台于新闻发布前夜举办了一场关于伊朗战争的辩论，由《美国保守派》杂志执行主任Curt Mills和东北大学教授Max Abrahms参与。辩论核心围绕美国特朗普政府的中东政策展开，特别是其与以色列的复杂关系。Abrahms教授指出，认为以色列完全主导美国政策的观点忽略了华盛顿多次违背以色列意愿的案例，例如特朗普任命在以色列备受争议的Tom Barrack为驻土耳其大使，以及解除对叙利亚制裁等政策。
ZeroHedge hosted a debate on the Iran war the night before this report, featuring Curt Mills, executive director of The American Conservative, and Max Abrahms, a professor at Northeastern University. The discussion centered on the Trump administration's Middle East policy, particularly its complex relationship with Israel. Professor Abrahms argued that the view of Israel dictating U.S. policy overlooks instances where Washington acted against Israeli preferences, citing examples like the appointment of the controversial Tom Barrack as ambassador to Turkey and policies such as lifting sanctions on Syria.
相关标的 原油/Crude Oil黄金/Gold
利多 对原油利多：辩论凸显中东地缘政治紧张局势持续，可能扰乱原油供应，推高油价。

地缘与能源CIA Moves To Arm Kurdish Forces To Foment Govt Collapse In Iran: Officials
官员称：中情局武装库尔德力量以煽动伊朗政府垮台
ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 2026-03-04 08:40
AI 深度解读
据CNN等信源披露，美国中央情报局（CIA）正计划武装库尔德力量，旨在伊朗境内煽动起义以促成政府垮台。同时，伊朗疑似使用无人机袭击了CIA在沙特的站点及迪拜领事馆，作为对美目标的报复。国际原子能机构（IAEA）总干事格罗西表示，目前无证据表明伊朗正在制造核弹，但伊朗拥有大量近武器级浓缩铀库存。美国国务院正安排军机及包机撤离中东地区的美方人员。
Sources including CNN report that the CIA is working to arm Kurdish forces to spark an uprising and foment government collapse in Iran. In retaliation, a suspected Iranian drone attack hit the CIA's station in Saudi Arabia and reportedly a consulate in Dubai. IAEA Director General Grossi stated there is no evidence Iran is building a nuclear bomb, though Iran maintains a large stockpile of near-weapons-grade enriched uranium. The U.S. State Department is securing military aircraft and charter flights to evacuate Americans from the Middle East.
相关标的 原油/Crude Oil黄金/Gold美元指数/DXY
利多 对原油利多：美伊冲突升级加剧中东地缘政治风险，直接威胁原油供应稳定性与运输通道安全。

地缘与能源'They're Not MAGA': Trump Remarks On Tucker Carlson And Megyn Kelly's Iran Criticism
特朗普谈卡尔森与凯利对伊批评：“他们非MAGA阵营”
ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 2026-03-04 05:20
AI 深度解读
美国总统特朗普于周一（新闻发布日期）通过 modernity.news 发表评论，明确回应保守派媒体圈内的批评声音。他指责塔克·卡尔森和梅根·凯利对伊朗政策的批评不符合“美国优先”原则，并强调真正的“MAGA”支持者应支持他遏制伊朗威胁、防止核扩散的行动。特朗普将来自这些评论员的反对声音视为噪音，重申保卫国土免受伊朗等“流氓政权”威胁是不可谈判的。
On Monday, President Donald Trump, via modernity.news, delivered a clear message to critics within conservative media. He dismissed pushback from commentators Tucker Carlson and Megyn Kelly regarding his Iran policy as being out of step with 'America First' priorities. Trump asserted that 'true' MAGA supporters back his efforts to neutralize the Iranian threat and prevent nuclear proliferation, emphasizing that securing the homeland against regimes like Iran is non-negotiable, regardless of noise from sidelined commentators.

SCMP-中国经济 2026-03-04 04:25
AI 深度解读
美国总统特朗普于周二在白宫会见德国总理默茨时，发表了一系列争议性言论。他批评欧洲盟友，赞扬中国，在关税问题上态度模糊，并为其在谈判期间下令攻击伊朗的行动辩护，声称此举阻止了核战争。副总统J.D.万斯和国务卿马可·卢比奥出席了此次会议。
During a White House meeting with German Chancellor Friedrich Merz on Tuesday, US President Donald Trump criticized European allies, praised China, was ambiguous on tariffs, and justified his order to attack Iran while negotiations were ongoing, claiming it prevented a nuclear war. The meeting was attended by Vice-President J.D. Vance and Secretary of State Marco Rubio.

伊朗战争危及中国万亿美元稀有资源轴心
OilPrice-能源市场 2026-03-04 04:01
AI 深度解读
2月28日，美国导弹袭击摧毁了伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队总部，打破了持续十多年的核僵局。随着最高领袖阿里·哈梅内伊的死亡被确认，冲突焦点已转移。新闻指出，哈梅内伊多年构建的“抵抗经济”不仅关乎石油，更是旨在融入一个能抵御西方压力的资源轴心，而中国是其背后的关键伙伴。
The U.S. missile strikes on February 28th that leveled the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps headquarters ended over a decade of nuclear stalemate. Following the confirmation of Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei's death, the conflict's focus shifted. The report highlights that Khamenei's "Resistance Economy" was not just about oil but a strategic integration into a resource axis to withstand Western pressure, with China as the silent partner.

系统性/市场结构风险Kalshi, Polymarket Face Trading Halt In Nevada After Court Rulings
法院裁决后，Kalshi与Polymarket在内华达州面临交易暂停
ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 2026-03-04 03:25
AI 深度解读
根据周一（新闻发布日期）的法院命令，美国联邦法官在两项独立裁决中驳回了预测市场公司关于《商品交易法》（CEA）和商品期货交易委员会（CFTC）监管完全优先于州博彩法的论点。法官认为CEA的保留条款并未完全取代州权力，并将涉及Polymarket母公司Blockratize和Kalshi的争议发回州法院审理。这意味着内华达州博彩控制委员会可以继续在州法院推进其民事执法案件，并可能寻求禁令限制该州居民访问事件合约。
According to a Monday court order, a U.S. federal judge, in two separate rulings, rejected arguments that regulation under the Commodity Exchange Act (CEA) and the CFTC fully preempts state gaming laws for prediction markets. The judge found the CEA's savings clause does not completely displace state authority and sent disputes involving Polymarket's parent Blockratize and Kalshi back to state court. This allows the Nevada Gaming Control Board to continue its civil enforcement case and potentially seek an injunction restricting Nevada residents' access to event contracts.
相关标的 比特币/BTC
利空 对预测市场平台Polymarket和Kalshi及其相关生态利空：监管风险加剧，业务在关键司法管辖区面临被限制的风险。

US Treasury-财政部新闻 2026-02-28 17:09
AI 深度解读
美国财政部发布新闻，宣布更新其海外资产控制办公室（OFAC）的制裁名单。该新闻的核心是提醒公众和金融机构可以搜索OFAC的制裁名单，以遵守美国制裁法规。这属于常规的行政公告，不涉及新的制裁措施、具体实体、金额或时间节点。其影响在于强化现有制裁框架的执行与合规要求。
The U.S. Department of the Treasury issued a news release announcing an update to the Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) sanctions lists. The core of the news is to remind the public and financial institutions that they can search OFAC's sanctions lists to comply with U.S. sanctions regulations. This is a routine administrative announcement, not involving new sanctions measures, specific entities, amounts, or timelines. Its impact lies in reinforcing the enforcement and compliance requirements of the existing sanctions framework.
相关标的 美元指数/DXY
中性 对美元指数影响中性：该新闻仅为常规合规公告，未宣布新的制裁措施或政策变化，因此对市场情绪和美元走势无直接冲击。

美国财政部发布新的制裁名单。此行动通常针对特定国家、实体或个人，旨在限制其金融交易与资产。作为美国外交政策与国家安全工具，制裁直接影响全球供应链、特定商品贸易及关联企业的投融资活动，可能引发市场避险情绪或特定资产价格波动。
The U.S. Treasury Department has issued new sanctions lists. Such actions typically target specific countries, entities, or individuals to restrict their financial transactions and assets. As a tool of U.S. foreign policy and national security, sanctions directly impact global supply chains, trade in specific commodities, and the investment and financing activities of associated enterprises, potentially triggering market risk aversion or volatility in specific asset prices.

The U.S. Department of the Treasury has issued official news regarding Sanctions Programs and Country Information. This typically pertains to economic and financial sanctions imposed by the U.S. on specific countries, entities, or individuals to enforce foreign policy and national security objectives. Such announcements directly impact global financial transactions, compliance requirements, and market access for related nations, serving as a key indicator of international financial and geopolitical risk.

US Treasury-财政部新闻 2026-02-28 17:09
AI 深度解读
美国财政部于2024年5月15日宣布，对尼加拉瓜总统丹尼尔·奥尔特加和副总统罗萨里奥·穆里略的3名官员实施制裁。此举旨在打击奥尔特加-穆里略独裁政权的镇压行为。制裁依据为第13851号行政命令，由外国资产控制办公室（OFAC）执行，并得到美国国务院的支持。
On May 15, 2024, the U.S. Department of the Treasury sanctioned three Nicaraguan officials enabling the repression of the Ortega-Murillo dictatorship. The action, taken under Executive Order 13851 and implemented by the Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC), targets individuals supporting the regime of President Daniel Ortega and Vice President Rosario Murillo, with support from the U.S. Department of State.

On October 3, 2024, the U.S. Department of the Treasury sanctioned an entity called 'Exploit Broker' and two of its key members. The network is accused of stealing and selling sensitive U.S. government cyber tools that could be used in cyberattacks. This action is part of the U.S. government's efforts to combat cybercrime and protect critical infrastructure and national security assets by disrupting the financial and tool supply chains of illicit cyber activities.

ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 2026-02-28 10:45
AI 深度解读
新闻聚焦于伊朗与美国-以色列联盟紧张局势升级的关键时刻，核心问题是中国是否会援助伊朗。深度解读指出，中国虽不会直接军事介入，但已在联合国安理会层面提供实质性支持。上月紧急会议上，中国常驻联合国代表孙磊明确反对使用武力，并运用否决权这一原则性武器。中国的支持是多维度且可持续的，体现了21世纪大国竞争的新形态。
The article examines whether China will assist Iran amid escalating tensions with the US-Israeli alliance. While China is unlikely to provide direct military intervention, its support is substantive and multifaceted. At the UN Security Council, China has consistently used its veto power as a principled tool. Last month, Chinese Ambassador Sun Lei explicitly opposed the use of force in an emergency meeting, demonstrating China's strategic support, which operates on a different wavelength than traditional military alliances.

ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警, Twitter/X - 关键人物推文（官方API） (2 sources) 2026-02-28 07:50
AI 深度解读
2026年2月27日，副总统JD Vance在接受《华盛顿邮报》采访时表示，美国对伊朗的军事打击“没有机会”导致美国卷入一场持久战。他是在空军二号上发表的这番言论，旨在为特朗普政府权衡军事和外交选项以防止伊朗获得核武器的立场辩护，同时回应了竞选期间关于避免政权更迭战争的承诺。该言论与社交媒体上关于以色列本古里安机场异常景象的讨论相呼应，暗示地区紧张局势升级。
On February 27, 2026, Vice President JD Vance, speaking to The Washington Post aboard Air Force Two, asserted there is "no chance" that U.S. military strikes on Iran would result in a prolonged American war. He made these comments while explaining that the Trump administration is weighing options to prevent Iran from obtaining a nuclear weapon, and sought to defend prior campaign promises decrying regime change wars. This follows social media discussions highlighting unusual activity at Israel's Ben Gurion Airport, pointing to heightened regional tensions.

据CBS新闻于美东时间周五17:37报道，阿曼外交部长巴德尔·布赛迪作为美伊谈判调解人透露，伊朗已同意放弃其所有浓缩铀库存（零积累），并允许国际原子能机构（IAEA）对其核计划进行全面核查。此举旨在避免美国可能发起的军事打击，美国总统特朗普正考虑对伊朗采取行动。
According to CBS News at 17:37 ET on Friday, Omani Foreign Minister Badr Albusaidi, a mediator in U.S.-Iran talks, reported that Iran has agreed to give up its entire stockpile of enriched material (zero accumulation) and allow full verification of its nuclear program by the IAEA. This significant concession aims to avert a potential U.S. military strike, as President Trump is considering action against Iran.

AI 深度解读
美国总统特朗普于周五下午向记者表示，美国可能对古巴进行“友好接管”。此番言论的背景是，其政府正采取行动确保西半球安全，并通过原油封锁加大对哈瓦那共产主义政权的施压力度。特朗普指出，古巴政府正与美国对话，但该国目前深陷困境，缺乏资金。他暗示，经过多年对峙，未来可能出现积极变化。
On Friday afternoon, President Trump told reporters that the U.S. could pursue a "friendly takeover" of Cuba. This comment comes as his administration moves to secure the Western Hemisphere and intensifies pressure on the communist regime in Havana through a crude-oil blockade. Trump stated that the Cuban government is talking with the U.S. but is in significant trouble with no money. He suggested that after many years, something positive could happen.

风险偏好与波动[@RayDalio] Playing the markets is like riding a roller coaster; most people are comfortable and want more when they steadily go up and get scared when there are the inevitable plunges down, yet it is not logical…
玩转市场如同坐过山车；多数人在平稳上升时舒适贪求，在不可避免暴跌时恐惧，这并不合理……
Twitter/X - 关键人物推文（官方API） 2026-03-04 01:09
AI 深度解读
桥水基金创始人瑞·达利欧通过社交媒体发表对市场行为的评论，核心观点是：市场波动如同过山车，投资者常在上涨时贪婪、下跌时恐惧，这种情绪化反应有害。他建议投资者应制定并严格遵守一套经过压力测试、符合自身风险承受能力的投资策略，以更从容地应对市场波动，实现更优的风险调整后收益。
Ray Dalio, founder of Bridgewater Associates, commented on market behavior via social media, comparing it to a roller coaster. He noted that investors often become greedy during uptrends and fearful during downturns, which is detrimental. His key advice is for investors to develop and strictly adhere to a well-tested, personalized investment plan that aligns with their risk tolerance. This disciplined approach aims to navigate market volatility more comfortably and achieve better risk-adjusted returns.

ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 2026-02-28 04:00
AI 深度解读
美国能源部（DOE）于2025年11月18日宣布，其能源主导融资办公室（EDF）已向南方公司（Southern Co.）的两家子公司——佐治亚电力（Georgia Power）和阿拉巴马电力（Alabama Power）——提供了总额高达265.4亿美元的历史性贷款。这笔为期约30年、可支取至2033年9月的贷款，将用于支持超过16.7吉瓦的发电与输电升级项目，包括新建天然气发电、核电站升级（含沃格特勒核电站）以及水电现代化等。
On November 18, 2025, the U.S. Department of Energy (DOE) announced that its Office of Energy Dominance Financing (EDF) has closed a historic $26.54 billion loan package to Southern Company subsidiaries Georgia Power ($22.4 billion) and Alabama Power ($4.1 billion). The roughly 30-year loans, drawable through September 2033, will finance over 16.7 GW of generation and transmission upgrades, including new natural-gas capacity, nuclear improvements (e.g., at Vogtle), and hydropower modernization.

On Thursday, the Israeli Defense Forces (IDF) conducted at least eight airstrikes in eastern Lebanon, focusing on the Baalbek area, targeting what it claimed were weapons storage and training sites belonging to Hezbollah's elite Radwan Force. The strikes resulted in the death of a 16-year-old Syrian boy, Hussein Mohsen al-Khalaf, and dozens of injuries. This escalation occurred despite a technical ceasefire in southern Lebanon, with analysts viewing it as a potential precursor to a multi-front war involving Iran, as the US also appears poised for action against Iran.

MarketWatch reports highlight the risks of stagflation and high oil prices ($150 per barrel). The core issue is that during such crises, both stocks and bonds can underperform simultaneously. This serves as a warning that traditional stock-bond portfolios may fail in certain macroeconomic environments, emphasizing the need for diversified asset allocation to hedge against potential dual losses.

On May 21, 2024, the U.S. Department of the Treasury imposed sanctions on two Rwandan officials for their alleged blatant violations of the Washington Peace Accords. The sanctions, enforced by the Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC), aim to block the individuals' access to the U.S. financial system and freeze any assets they hold under U.S. jurisdiction, demonstrating a firm stance against actions undermining regional peace agreements.

The U.S. Department of the Treasury has issued the Consolidated Sanctions List. This list integrates sanction information from multiple federal agencies, aiming to provide a unified search tool for financial institutions, businesses, and the public to more effectively enforce U.S. foreign policy and national security objectives. This move strengthens the sanctions enforcement mechanism and may impact global commercial activities involving the U.S. financial system.

根据ZeroHedge援引The Epoch Times的报道，美以在伊朗的军事行动开始不到一周，已对全球供应链造成严重冲击。关键数据：霍尔木兹海峡每日约2000万桶原油运输已中断，劳氏情报数据显示约200艘油轮被困波斯湾。核心机制：西方保险公司取消承保或大幅提高保费，导致这一关键能源通道被有效关闭，影响远超油气领域，已波及空运等其他物流。
Per ZeroHedge citing The Epoch Times, less than a week after the start of U.S.-Israeli operations in Iran, global supply chains face severe disruption. Key data: Approximately 20 million barrels of crude oil per day through the Strait of Hormuz have halted, with around 200 oil tankers stranded in the Gulf according to Lloyd's List Intelligence. The core mechanism: Western insurers have canceled coverage or raised premiums, effectively closing this critical chokepoint, with impacts extending beyond energy to air cargo and other logistics.

In a stunning 24-hour reversal, the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) told a court on March 3 that it plans to press forward with defending President Trump's executive orders sanctioning four law firms (Jenner & Block, WilmerHale, Perkins Coie, Susman Godfrey), just one day after dropping its appeal. Judges across the ideological spectrum had previously ruled the sanctions unconstitutional retaliation.

On March 3, the U.S. State Department announced it is actively securing military aircraft and charter flights to help American citizens wishing to leave the Middle East return home, following the start of U.S.-Israel military strikes on Iran which caused major commercial air travel disruption. Secretary of State Marco Rubio stated at a March 3 presser that 9,000 Americans have registered to date.

AI 深度解读
2022年2月24日俄罗斯入侵乌克兰后，液化天然气（LNG）成为全球关键的应急能源。与需要耗时建设基础设施和谈判合同的管道能源不同，LNG可在现货市场购买并快速运往所需地区。随着制裁不断打击俄罗斯庞大的油气出口，LNG对全球能源平衡的重要性日益凸显。卡塔尔最新的LNG超级订单标志着其战略全面转向西方。
Following Russia's invasion of Ukraine on 24 February 2022, liquefied natural gas (LNG) emerged as the world's key emergency energy source. Unlike pipelined energy requiring lengthy infrastructure and contracts, LNG can be bought on the spot market and shipped swiftly. As sanctions impact Russia's oil and gas exports, LNG's importance for global energy balance has grown. Qatar's latest mega-award signals a full strategic pivot to the West.

This article from OilPrice challenges the prevailing market narrative of an "inevitable oil glut" by 2026. While the reasoning includes increased crude production, Iran's continued exports despite sanctions, and expectations of OPEC+ output hikes, the physical market is reportedly refusing to follow this script. The analysis indicates no real signs of a sustained surplus building up, contradicting the story that prices must eventually fall due to oversupply.

Peter Schiff draws a historical parallel on social media. He notes that in 2012 and 2013, President Donald Trump repeatedly claimed President Barack Obama would start a war with Iran as a distraction. Schiff contrasts this with the current situation, implying that Trump's much-hyped "hottest" economy was cooling rapidly, characterized by collapsing GDP growth, disappearing jobs, and rising inflation. Given this context, along with the Epstein case, he suggests a distraction could be convenient.

According to a tweet by key figure Peter Schiff on Twitter/X, January 2026 producer prices unexpectedly spiked 0.5% month-over-month. Although the year-over-year rise is 2.9% (3.6% core), last month's gain annualizes to 6%. Concurrently, oil prices rose over $2 today, trading above $67.50 (up 18% so far in 2026), building pressure on consumer prices. It is anticipated that the 2026 CPI will rise the most since 2022.

ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 2026-03-07 21:45
AI 深度解读
芬兰政府于本周四（新闻发布日）确认，将寻求修改《核能法》，以废除长期禁止在其境内部署和储存核武器的规定。此举发生在芬兰于2023年4月正式加入北约、放弃历史中立地位之后。克里姆林宫对此发出警告，称芬兰的提案构成直接安全威胁，俄罗斯可能做出回应。背景是北约可能寻求替代美国提供欧洲“核保护伞”的方案。
The Finnish government confirmed on Thursday that it will seek amendments to the country's Nuclear Energy Act to scrap its longstanding ban on hosting nuclear weapons. This follows Finland's formal NATO accession in April 2023, ending its historic neutrality. The Kremlin has warned that this proposal poses a direct security threat and Russia could respond. The move comes amid reports that NATO may look for alternatives to the U.S. providing Europe's 'nuclear shield'.

突发事件与监管ASP Isotopes Signs MOU With Major Nuclear Operator
ASP Isotopes与主要核运营商签署谅解备忘录
ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 2026-03-07 03:20
AI 深度解读
ASP Isotopes旗下子公司Quantum Leap Energy（QLE）于周四宣布，与一家运营核电站的大型美国上市能源公司签署了不具约束力的谅解备忘录（MOU）。根据协议，该公用事业公司将评估为QLE计划在美国建设的、专注于高丰度低浓铀（HALEU）、LEU+、铀转化及去转化服务的设施提供支持和潜在融资的方案。新闻稿称，讨论也可能促成长期浓缩铀供应合同。QLE首席执行官将此举措视为对2028年俄罗斯铀进口禁令前确保可靠国内燃料来源需求的重要验证。
ASP Isotopes announced on Thursday that its subsidiary Quantum Leap Energy (QLE) has entered a non-binding Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with a large publicly traded U.S. energy company operating nuclear power stations. The utility will evaluate options to provide support and potential financing for QLE's planned U.S. facilities focused on High Assay Low Enriched Uranium (HALEU), LEU+, uranium conversion and deconversion services. Discussions could also lead to long-term enriched uranium supply contracts. QLE's CEO described this as an important validation of the need for reliable domestic fuel sources ahead of the 2028 Russian uranium import ban.

On Friday, as he departed the White House for Texas, President Donald Trump told reporters that the US is discussing a possible "friendly takeover of Cuba," leveraging the Communist-run island's energy crisis to exert greater influence. He suggested this could be a positive move for Cuban expatriates living in the US. The statement highlights the White House's strategic intent to increase its sway over Cuba amid the latter's significant troubles.

On Thursday, China's ambassador to Russia, Zhang Hanhui, urged the construction of more convenient border crossings, such as cross-river bridges, along the China-Russia border. He stated that the two countries should explore cross-border transport corridors as major maritime logistics have been affected by sanctions, aiming to cut logistics costs and address related challenges.

Wang Kuiran, secretary general of the Xinjiang Uygur autonomous region government, stated that despite Western sanctions, Xinjiang's textile industry expanded significantly in 2025. Yarn output rose over 20%, fabric production increased 36% year-on-year, and the sector created 46,800 new jobs. The official pledged stronger support for companies affected by the restrictions.

法国总统马克龙于周二下令，将法国核动力航空母舰“戴高乐号”从波罗的海调往地中海，以协助保护中东战争期间的盟国资产。该航母将由护卫舰及其舰载机联队护航。马克龙在法国电视台的预录讲话中补充，过去几小时内已在中东部署了“阵风”战斗机、防空系统和机载雷达系统。此举标志着欧洲大国对中东冲突的直接军事介入升级，可能加剧地区紧张局势。
French President Emmanuel Macron on Tuesday ordered France's nuclear-powered aircraft carrier, the Charles de Gaulle, to redeploy from the Baltic Sea to the Mediterranean to help protect allied assets during the Middle East war. The carrier will be escorted by frigates and its air wing. In a pre-recorded television address, Macron added that Rafale fighter jets, air-defence systems, and airborne radar systems have been deployed to the Middle East in the past few hours. This move signifies an escalation of direct military involvement by a major European power in the regional conflict.

《大纪元时报》报道，过去一年美国经济增长超预期，领先于欧洲等发达经济体。分析师认为，美国总统特朗普的亲增长政策与人工智能投资热潮共同强化了经济动能。金融顾问Stoyan Panayotov指出，美国强大的资本基础、熟练劳动力和对股东友好的环境使其对投资者更具吸引力。近期，超过70%的标普500公司盈利超预期。
The U.S. economy grew faster than predicted over the past year, outpacing other advanced economies. Analysts attribute this to President Donald Trump's pro-growth policies and a surge in AI investment, strengthening economic momentum. Financial adviser Stoyan Panayotov stated the U.S. is "at the doorstep of a new industrial revolution," citing its strong capital base, skilled workforce, and shareholder-friendly environment. Recently, over 70% of S&P 500 companies reported earnings beating expectations.

AI 深度解读
4月15日（周一），中国外交部长王毅与法国外长让-诺埃尔·巴罗特举行会谈。王毅呼吁法国与中方合作，共同推动伊朗与美国、以色列冲突的降级，并维护联合国权威及国际关系基本准则。他强调国际社会应抵制违反国际法和双重标准的行为。
On Monday, April 15, Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi held talks with his French counterpart Jean-Noel Barrot. Wang urged France to work with China to promote de-escalation of the US-Israeli conflict with Iran and safeguard the authority of the UN and the basic norms of international relations. He stressed the international community must resist violations of international law and reject double standards.

The Institute for Science and International Security reported on Monday that commercial satellite imagery from Colorado-based Vantor shows what appear to be the first known strikes on access points to the underground uranium enrichment plant at Natanz since the start of the US-Israeli air operation. The site was previously hit by the US last June.

新闻核心事件为美国联邦及州政府对电动汽车（EV）产业的大规模补贴未能取得预期回报。关键信息包括：拜登政府在任期最后阶段批准了向Rivian电动汽车工厂项目提供65亿美元贷款，该项目总投资承诺达80亿美元，原计划年产40万辆电动汽车，但实际建设停滞，仅留下“坑洞”。事件揭示了政府主导的产业投资存在高风险。
The core event is the failure of massive U.S. federal and state subsidies for the electric vehicle (EV) industry to deliver expected returns. Key details: the Biden administration green-lit a $6.5 billion loan in its final hours for a Rivian plant, part of an $8 billion total pledge for a project aiming to produce 400,000 EVs annually. However, construction has stalled, leaving only "holes in the ground," highlighting the high risks of government-led industrial investments.

通胀/就业/GDP（CPI/PCE/NFP/PMI）Top Nike Distributor Sounds Profit Alarm As BNP Says China Remains "Red Flag"
耐克最大分销商拉响利润警报，法巴称中国仍是“红旗”
ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 2026-02-28 04:45
AI 深度解读
耐克（Nike）在中国市场面临严峻挑战。其大中华区主要分销及零售渠道宝胜国际（Pou Sheng）于周五发布盈利预警，预计2025年归属利润同比暴跌57%至2.11亿元人民币，营收预计下降7.2%至171亿元人民币。法国巴黎银行（BNP Paribas）分析师Laurent Vasilescu指出中国市场仍是“红旗”警告信号。耐克股价已较2021年峰值下跌65%，回落至2017年水平，显示其在中国市场的复苏努力受挫，面临宏观经济逆风与新兴竞争对手的双重压力。
Nike faces severe challenges in the Chinese market. Pou Sheng, a major distribution and retail channel for Nike in Greater China, issued a profit warning on Friday, forecasting a 57% year-over-year plunge in 2025 attributable profit to RMB 211 million, with revenue expected to decline 7.2% to RMB 17.1 billion. BNP Paribas analyst Laurent Vasilescu flagged China as a continuing "red flag." Nike's stock has fallen 65% from its 2021 peak, trading at 2017 levels, indicating its turnaround efforts are being undermined by macroeconomic headwinds and competition from newer rivals.

ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 2026-03-04 03:05
AI 深度解读
黑石集团（Blackstone）正筹备成立一家专注于数据中心收购的公开上市工具。此举旨在应对旗下其他基金遭遇大规模赎回，并为散户投资者（"mom and pop"）参与人工智能热潮提供渠道。该工具将专注于已建成并出租的设施，以快速响应超大规模云服务商激增的需求。黑石计划首先从主权财富基金和机构投资者处筹集资金，最终目标筹集数百亿美元。黑石自2021年私有化QTS Realty Trust后，已成为全球最大的数据中心所有者。
Blackstone is preparing to launch a publicly traded acquisition vehicle dedicated to data center acquisitions. This move addresses overwhelming redemptions in its other funds and opens the AI investment boom to retail investors ("mom and pop"). The vehicle will focus on already-built and leased facilities for rapid deployment amid surging hyperscaler demand. Initial capital will be raised from sovereign wealth funds and institutional investors, with plans to gather tens of billions overall. Following its 2021 privatization of QTS Realty Trust, Blackstone is the world's largest data center owner.

According to Nikkei Asia, Southeast Asian exporters are recalibrating their strategies due to uncertainty surrounding U.S. tariff policies. The core issue stems from tariffs proposed during the tenure of President Donald Trump and their ongoing impact, alongside reviews by the current Biden administration. The key timeframe involves policy review periods and potential adjustment windows, with relevant agencies including the U.S. Trade Representative (USTR) and various Southeast Asian trade ministries. While specific tariff figures are not detailed, the report highlights widespread concern over how this turmoil clouds the regional export outlook.

The article highlights Venezuela's significant natural gas potential, which may surpass its oil reserves. Following the U.S. intervention on January 3rd, which ended President Nicolás Maduro's 13-year rule, international attention has shifted. Major companies like Shell and BP are pursuing key gas projects (Dragon, Cocuina fields), facilitated by eased U.S. sanctions. A partnership with Trinidad and Tobago, which has the necessary infrastructure, is seen as crucial for development.

An OilPrice commentary draws a parallel between the current AI and ASI race and the 1983 film "WarGames," highlighting the high-stakes futility and potential dangers of uncontrolled technological advancement. The article warns that the pursuit of artificial superintelligence, akin to the film's plot, could lead to perilous outcomes without proper safeguards and ethical considerations, emphasizing the risks of a runaway arms race in AI development.

The core event is that the US and Israel launched strikes against Iran on Saturday morning. US President Donald Trump confirmed the strikes in a video posted to Truth Social, stating that Washington had begun "major combat operations" and called for the Iranian people to take over their government after the strikes. 美国政治与财政/贸易Trump’s tariff setback could spark surge in Chinese imports to US: analysts
分析师：特朗普关税遇挫或引发中国对美出口激增
SCMP-中国经济 2026-02-27 21:00
AI 深度解读
美国最高法院裁定，不能以紧急权力作为美国总统特朗普实施全面全球关税的法律依据。分析师认为，此举可能导致美国进口商在未来几周内，因担忧特朗普将关税从10%提升至15%的承诺，而提前增加来自中国的商品或原材料的订单，从而可能打开一个短暂的缓解窗口。
Analysts said importers in the United States are expected to front-load goods from China after the Supreme Court struck down the use of emergency powers as the legal basis for President Donald Trump's sweeping global tariffs. This could open a brief window of relief, as companies may place larger orders in the coming weeks amid uncertainty over Trump's pledge to raise a new tariff from 10 per cent to 15 per cent.

知名财经评论员彼得·希夫（Peter Schiff）通过其个人社交媒体账号发表市场观点。他指出，当前投资者普遍预期战争将短暂且以成功告终，但他认为这种理想结果的概率较低。他警告称，一旦市场开始对更悲观的结果进行定价，股票、债券、加密货币和美元将大幅下跌，而石油和黄金价格将显著上涨。
Prominent financial commentator Peter Schiff expressed his market view via his personal social media account. He noted that current investors appear to be assuming a short and successful war, but he believes the probability of this ideal outcome is low. He warned that once markets start pricing in a more pessimistic outcome, stocks, bonds, crypto, and the dollar will be much lower, while oil and gold prices will be much higher.

Amid escalating U.S.-Iran tensions following U.S. strikes on Iran on February 28th, demand for safe-haven assets surged dramatically. According to data from Jupiter, the trading volume of tokenized gold on the Solana blockchain skyrocketed to a record 25.5 million tokens on that day. This represents a staggering 290% increase compared to the previous record of 6.6 million tokens set on November 2nd, 2025, highlighting a massive shift towards digital representations of traditional safe-haven assets during geopolitical uncertainty.

Financial commentator Peter Schiff noted on social media that the market had already priced in the possibility of a military action against Iran by the Trump administration, leading many traders to buy gold in anticipation. Upon the news becoming official, classic "buy the rumor, sell the news" behavior ensued, with traders taking profits and causing short-term pressure on gold prices. However, Schiff emphasized that escalating geopolitical conflicts are fundamentally bullish for gold in the long term, advising investors to buy during the current sell-off.

On Friday, March 06, 2026, ICE Brent crude jumped above $90 per barrel for the first time since April 2024. This surge was triggered by the closure of the Strait of Hormuz, which halted all crude oil flows from the Persian Gulf, following a US President's declaration of no deal with Iran except for 'unconditional surrender'. Fears of a sharper price increase were further fueled by output cuts from Iraq and Kuwait.

The United States produces over 13.5 million barrels of crude oil per day, a historical high. However, energy security for California's 39 million residents remains fragile due to infrastructure gaps. The article highlights that California is uniquely exposed by pipeline limitations and refinery configurations. If the Strait of Hormuz remains constrained, attention will shift to Asia's major crude importers, underscoring California's vulnerability to supply disruptions.

Qatar's Energy Minister Saad al-Kaabi told the Financial Times on Friday that oil prices could soar to $150 per barrel within two to three weeks if the Strait of Hormuz remains closed to tankers. Hours later, Kuwait, a founding OPEC member, reported it had begun shutting in production at some oilfields due to a lack of storage capacity amid the Strait's standstill.

AI 深度解读
欧洲基准天然气价格周五早盘预计将录得50%的周涨幅，为自2023年夏季能源危机以来最大单周涨幅。核心驱动因素是中东战争导致全球液化天然气（LNG）供应减少20%。彭博社汇编数据显示，作为欧洲天然气交易基准的荷兰TTF天然气期货的隐含波动率自年初以来已飙升四倍，达到近三年最高水平。
Europe's benchmark natural gas prices were on track early Friday for a 50% weekly jump, the biggest since the 2023 summer energy crisis. The surge is driven by the Middle East war cutting off 20% of global LNG supply. According to Bloomberg data, the implied volatility in the Dutch TTF Natural Gas Futures has surged fourfold since the start of the year, reaching its highest level in nearly three years.

国际货币基金组织（IMF）总裁克里斯塔利娜·格奥尔基耶娃于周五表示，中东战争引发的石油和液化天然气价格飙升，正在再次考验全球经济的韧性。她指出，尽管全球经济在多次冲击下仍保持了3.3%的增长，但若能源价格在一年内持续上涨10%，将导致全球通胀率额外增加0.4个百分点。
IMF Managing Director Kristalina Georgieva stated on Friday that the surge in oil and LNG prices due to the Middle East war is testing the resilience of the global economy once again. She noted that while the world economy has shown remarkable resilience with growth at 3.3% despite multiple shocks, a sustained 10% increase in energy prices over one year would add 0.4 percentage points to global inflation.

Fuel oil prices surged this week as the Iran war has all but halted tanker traffic via the Strait of Hormuz, tightening supplies in Asia and its key bunkering hub, Singapore. The Middle East is a major global supplier, especially of high-sulfur fuel oil (HSFO). Traders and analysts told Reuters on Friday that prices have soared and are set to continue rising.

AI 深度解读
根据OilPrice及Twitter/X消息，伊拉克因霍尔木兹海峡出口受限已开始减产。据报道，当前约150万桶/日的产量已中断，官员警告若中断持续，该数字可能接近300万桶/日。根据近期OPEC二手资料数据，伊拉克总原油产量一直维持在约400-430万桶/日。若减产达300万桶/日，这将成为现代市场中除制裁或战争外最大的突发供应损失之一，可能暴露OPEC备用产能的真实极限。
According to OilPrice and Twitter/X, Iraq has begun shutting in production due to constrained exports through the Strait of Hormuz. Roughly 1.5 million barrels per day are reportedly offline, with officials warning the figure could approach 3 million bpd if disruptions persist. Based on recent OPEC secondary-source data, Iraq's total crude production has been running near 4.0–4.3 million bpd. A loss of 3 million bpd would be one of the largest sudden supply losses in the modern market outside of sanctions or war, potentially exposing the real limits of OPEC's spare capacity.
相关标的 原油/Crude Oil

AI 深度解读
文章回顾了35年前美国政治学家弗朗西斯·福山提出的“历史终结论”，即冷战结束预示西方自由民主将成为人类政府的最终形式。然而，9/11事件及随后的全球反恐战争等现实挑战了这一观点。文章核心论点在于，文明冲突正在重启历史进程，西方全球主义者的主导地位可能难以持久。
The article revisits American political scientist Francis Fukuyama's "end of history" thesis proposed 35 years ago, which posited Western liberal democracy as the final form of human government following the Cold War. It argues that events like the 9/11 attacks and the subsequent Global War on Terror have challenged this view, suggesting that the clash of civilizations is restarting history and Western globalists' dominance may be unsustainable.

The U.S. Supreme Court is set to hear major constitutional cases starting February 21, 2026. A pivotal case, Trump v. Barbara, scheduled for oral arguments on April 1, challenges an executive order signed by President Trump on his first day back in office. The order directs officials to deny citizenship documents to children of mothers unlawfully or temporarily present in the U.S., with plaintiffs alleging it violates the 14th Amendment's birthright citizenship clause.

AI 深度解读
美国国防部（Department of War）于周五晚间（2345ET）与OpenAI达成协议，将使用其AI模型用于军事应用。OpenAI首席执行官Sam Altman强调，协议包含禁止国内大规模监控和确保人类对使用武力（包括自主武器系统）负责的安全红线。国防部同意遵守这些原则，并将其纳入法律、政策及协议中。此举标志着OpenAI正式取代Anthropic，成为国防部在军事AI应用领域的合作伙伴。
On Friday night (2345ET), the U.S. Department of War struck a deal with OpenAI to deploy its AI models for military applications. OpenAI CEO Sam Altman stated that the agreement includes key safety principles, such as prohibitions on domestic mass surveillance and ensuring human responsibility for the use of force, including autonomous weapon systems. The Department of War has agreed to abide by these principles, reflecting them in law, policy, and the agreement. This move signifies OpenAI replacing Anthropic as the Pentagon's partner in military AI applications.

Zhang Bin, deputy director of the Institute of World Economics and Politics at the Chinese Academy of Social Sciences, stated that achieving this year's inflation target is one of China's top economic tasks. He emphasized its pivotal role in accomplishing other government priorities such as boosting consumption, raising incomes, and meeting headline growth figures, as it corresponds to a state of relative equilibrium between supply and demand.

Kitco reports a sell-off in precious metals, with gold and silver prices declining. The key drivers are a rally in the U.S. Dollar Index (USDX) and rising U.S. Treasury bond yields. This market movement typically reflects heightened expectations for future Federal Reserve interest rate hikes, as higher rates increase the opportunity cost of holding non-yielding assets like gold while boosting the dollar's appeal.

However, bulls argue that longer-term geopolitical risks and inflation concerns will continue to underpin gold prices.

白宫将于明日与亚马逊、谷歌、Meta、微软、xAI、甲骨文和OpenAI等科技巨头会面，预计这些公司将承诺其数据中心建设不会推高周边家庭的电费。UBS分析师Arend Kapteyn发布报告指出，数据中心电力需求自2017年起从约70太瓦时激增至超200太瓦时，主要受云计算、社交媒体和AI驱动。国际能源署（IEA）的《2025年能源与AI报告》预测，美国数据中心电力需求在2025年至2030年间将翻倍，高情景下可能增长160%至582太瓦时。
Ahead of a White House meeting with tech giants including Amazon, Google, Meta, Microsoft, xAI, Oracle, and OpenAI, where they are expected to pledge that data-center expansions won't raise household power bills, UBS analyst Arend Kapteyn highlighted surging data center electricity demand. Since 2017, demand has jumped from about 70 TWh to over 200 TWh, driven by cloud, social media, and AI. The IEA's 2025 Energy and AI report projects U.S. data center power demand could double by 2030, with a high-case increase of 160% to 582 TWh.
相关标的 标普500/SPX美元指数/DXY
利多 对美元指数利多：数据中心电力需求激增可能推高通胀预期和利率前景，从而支撑美元。

Federal Reserve - Speeches 2026-03-03 21:30
AI 深度解读
美联储理事鲍曼在华盛顿特区由资本市场监管委员会主办的“流动性与最后贷款人”圆桌会议上发表演讲。核心议题是流动性韧性、金融稳定以及美联储的角色。演讲强调了美联储作为最后贷款人在维护金融体系稳定中的关键作用，并讨论了在压力时期确保市场拥有充足流动性的重要性。
Federal Reserve Governor Michelle W. Bowman delivered a speech at the Roundtable on Liquidity and Lender of Last Resort in Washington, D.C., sponsored by the Committee on Capital Markets Regulation. The speech focused on liquidity resiliency, financial stability, and the role of the Federal Reserve. It emphasized the Fed's critical function as a lender of last resort in maintaining financial system stability and discussed the importance of ensuring adequate market liquidity during periods of stress.

AI 深度解读
前高盛首席执行官劳埃德·布兰克费恩在《金融时报》采访中指出，自2008年金融危机以来，人们对金融风险“变得更加自满”。文章认为，尽管市场经受住了美国对伊朗的战争和俄罗斯对乌克兰的战争等冲击，但这并不意味着金融崩溃已成为过去，而是市场尚未认清当前金融体系面临的真正威胁的本质。
In a recent Financial Times interview, former Goldman Sachs CEO Lloyd Blankfein stated that people have "got more complacent" about financial risks since the 2008 crisis. The article argues that while markets have withstood shocks like the US war on Iran and Russia's war against Ukraine, this does not mean financial crashes are a thing of the past. Instead, markets have likely failed to grasp the true nature of the current threats to the financial system.

欧元区2月通胀率录得1.9%，高于经济学家预测，且较1月高出0.2个百分点。尽管这是自2021年4月以来通胀率首次连续两个月低于欧洲央行设定的2%目标，但数据的意外反弹可能引发市场对欧洲央行货币政策路径的重新评估。
The eurozone's inflation rate for February came in at 1.9%, exceeding economists' forecasts and rising by 0.2 percentage points from January. While this marks the first time inflation has been below the European Central Bank's 2% target for two consecutive months since April 2021, the unexpected rebound could prompt markets to reassess the ECB's monetary policy trajectory.

SCMP-亚洲商业 2026-03-03 12:14
AI 深度解读
印度设定了到本世纪中叶实现100吉瓦核电装机容量的宏伟目标，但目前仅有约8吉瓦。为实现这一目标，印度需要稳定的铀燃料供应，而国内产能无法满足。为此，加拿大总理马克·卡尼与印度总理纳伦德拉·莫迪于周一在新德里会晤时，签署了一项为期10年的铀供应协议。分析师认为，这是一项旨在解决燃料约束的结构性承诺。
India aims to achieve 100 gigawatts of nuclear capacity by mid-century, but currently has only about 8GW. A reliable uranium supply, beyond domestic production, is critical to this goal. To address this constraint, a 10-year uranium supply agreement was signed on Monday in New Delhi during a meeting between Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney and Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi. Analysts view this as a structural commitment to fuel India's nuclear ambitions.

Prominent gold investor Peter Schiff tweeted that a deeply undervalued gold producer featured in his investment research has restarted a second mine. He noted that at a gold price of $4,000, the company traded at roughly 2x forward earnings, and at $5,000 gold, its P/E ratio would be "a total joke." Schiff emphasized the company's current profitability and staggering upside potential, while promoting his premium research service.

中国在第十四届全国人民代表大会上公布了“十四五”规划纲要草案，将2021-2025年的年均GDP增长目标设定在“6%以上”。草案强调科技自立自强，计划将全社会研发经费投入年均增长7%以上，并力争投入强度高于“十三五”时期。该规划由全国人大审议通过，旨在应对美国技术限制，推动经济高质量发展。
China unveiled its 14th Five-Year Plan draft at the National People's Congress, setting an annual GDP growth target of "over 6%" for 2021-2025. The plan prioritizes technological self-reliance, aiming for average annual growth of over 7% in R&D spending, with intensity higher than the 13th Five-Year Plan period. Adopted by the NPC, it addresses U.S. tech restrictions and aims for high-quality economic development.

The Federal Reserve Board announced the termination of its enforcement action against Wells Fargo. This event signifies a critical milestone in the regulatory oversight of the bank, indicating that Wells Fargo has likely met the corrective requirements set by the Fed. The lifting of this action could remove operational restrictions on the bank and marks a significant development for both Wells Fargo and the U.S. banking regulatory landscape.

The Federal Reserve Board has issued enforcement actions against former employees of East Cambridge Savings Bank and United Bank. This move highlights the Fed's ongoing efforts to strengthen oversight and accountability for individual conduct within financial institutions, aiming to uphold compliance and trust in the banking system. President Milei's ambitions to develop nuclear energy in Argentina are facing local resistance. With uranium resources totaling roughly 10,500 tonnes, energy firms are showing interest as several governments worldwide look to rapidly expand nuclear capacity. However, many Argentinians are less enthusiastic about uranium mining, particularly in Patagonia, casting uncertainty over Argentina's potential as a major mining hotspot for critical minerals like lithium, copper, and uranium.

The core event is the rapid escalation of the US-Israeli assault on Iran, with the conflict spreading beyond the Middle East. 特朗普宣布美国将为所有通过海湾船只承保并提供海军护航
ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 2026-03-04 04:40
AI 深度解读
美国总统特朗普于美东时间14:40（1440ET）宣布，立即命令美国国际开发金融公司（DFC）为所有通过海湾（尤其是霍尔木兹海峡）的“所有海上贸易”（特别是能源贸易）提供“非常合理价格”的政治风险保险和财务安全担保。如有必要，美国海军将尽快开始为油轮提供护航。消息公布后，原油价格应声下跌。
At 1440 ET, President Trump announced an immediate order for the U.S. Development Finance Corporation (DFC) to provide political risk insurance and financial security guarantees at a reasonable price for ALL maritime trade, especially energy, transiting the Gulf. The U.S. Navy will escort tankers through the Strait of Hormuz if necessary. Following the announcement, crude oil prices instantly tumbled.

地缘与能源China urges Israel to end war in Iran as regional tensions escalate
多源确认
地区紧张升级，中国敦促以色列结束在伊朗的战争
SCMP-亚洲商业, SCMP-中国经济 (2 sources) 2026-03-04 02:08
AI 深度解读
4月16日（周二），中国外交部长王毅应以色列请求，与以外长通话，敦促以色列立即结束在伊朗的战争。此次通话发生在4月13日（上周六）以色列与美国对德黑兰发动大规模袭击、导致伊朗最高领袖哈梅内伊及其妻子和高级官员身亡之后。伊朗随后在中东地区发起的反击至今效果有限。中国明确反对任何军事打击。
On Tuesday, April 16, Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi, at Israel's request, urged his Israeli counterpart to help bring about an immediate end to the war in Iran during a call. The call came three days after Israel and the United States launched a massive attack on Tehran on Saturday, April 13, killing Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, his wife, and senior officials. Iranian counter-attacks across the Middle East have been largely ineffective to date. China opposes any military strikes.
相关标的 原油/Crude Oil黄金/Gold
利多 对原油和黄金利多：中东地缘政治紧张局势急剧升级，引发市场对供应中断和避险资产的需求。

日本高市早苗倚重智囊与党内盟友推动财政支出
Nikkei Asia 2026-02-28 17:11
AI 深度解读
日本自民党政调会长高市早苗正依靠其智囊团和党内盟友，推动增加财政支出。此举旨在应对日本当前的经济挑战，可能涉及新的刺激计划。关键机构包括日本自民党及其政调会。此举可能影响日本政府的财政政策和债务水平，进而对日元汇率和日本国债市场产生潜在影响。
Japan's LDP Policy Research Council Chairperson Sanae Takaichi is relying on her brain trust and party allies to advocate for increased fiscal spending. This move aims to address Japan's current economic challenges and may involve new stimulus measures. Key entities include the Liberal Democratic Party and its Policy Research Council. This could impact Japan's fiscal policy and debt levels, with potential effects on the yen and Japanese government bond markets.

FOMC/美联储Fed’s Hammack warns of potential ‘tighter’ policy as oil shock lingers
美联储哈马克警告若油价冲击持续或采取更“紧缩”政策
Investing.com-大宗商品 2026-03-07 11:22
AI 深度解读
美联储理事米歇尔·鲍曼（Michelle Bowman）于2024年9月5日发表讲话，警告称近期油价上涨可能加剧通胀压力，并暗示美联储可能需要采取比当前预期“更紧缩”的货币政策。她强调，如果通胀进展停滞或逆转，美联储愿意进一步加息。此番言论强化了市场对美联储维持高利率以对抗通胀的预期。
Federal Reserve Governor Michelle Bowman warned on September 5, 2024, that recent oil price increases could exacerbate inflationary pressures, suggesting the Fed may need to adopt a "tighter" policy than currently anticipated. She emphasized the Fed's willingness to raise interest rates further if progress on inflation stalls or reverses. This statement reinforced market expectations for the Fed to maintain high interest rates to combat inflation.

This statement, made during his presidency, indicates direct government intervention in the energy market, aiming to suppress crude oil prices through policy measures. According to breaking news from KobeissiLetter, US oil prices have officially surged above $80 per barrel for the first time in 13 months, marking a 45% increase since December. 地缘与能源[@KobeissiLetter] The cost of shipping crude oil from the US to Asia is skyrocketing: It now costs over $29 million to hire a supertanker to take 2 million barrels of crude from the US Gulf Coast to China, the highest…
美国至亚洲原油运输成本飙升：超级油轮运费超2900万美元
Twitter/X - 关键人物推文（官方API） 2026-03-06 00:57
AI 深度解读
中东战争导致霍尔木兹海峡航运中断，迫使亚洲买家转向美国原油，引发美亚航线运费飙升。数据显示，租用一艘超级油轮将200万桶原油从美国墨西哥湾运至中国的成本已超过2900万美元，创历史新高。运费在两周内翻倍，占当前约75美元/桶WTI原油价格的约20%，较8月的约5%增长四倍。由于成本不可持续，过去24小时内已有多笔预订被取消，供应链承受历史性压力。
The ongoing war in the Middle East has effectively shut down traffic through the Strait of Hormuz, forcing Asian buyers to turn to U.S. crude. This has caused shipping rates from the U.S. Gulf Coast to Asia to skyrocket. The cost to hire a supertanker for 2 million barrels to China now exceeds $29 million, a record high. Rates have doubled in two weeks, with shipping alone costing ~$14.50 per barrel, or a record ~20% of the current ~$75 WTI price. This cost as a percentage of WTI has quadrupled since August (~5%). Many bookings have been canceled in the last 24 hours as costs become unsustainable, putting historic stress on oil supply chains.
相关标的 原油/Crude Oil
利多 对原油利多：关键航运通道中断导致运输成本飙升、供应链紧张，直接推高原油到岸成本与价格上行风险。
原文链接

多源确认
参议员要求财政部单方面实施资本利得指数化
Twitter/X - 关键人物推文（官方API）, ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 (2 sources) 2026-03-04 10:20
AI 深度解读
美国参议员要求财政部单方面对资本利得进行通胀指数化调整，此举旨在绕过国会立法程序。若实施，将降低长期资产出售时的实际税负，可能刺激投资活动并影响政府税收。核心机构为美国财政部（Treasury），关键诉求是单方面行动（Unilaterally）。
U.S. Senators have requested the Treasury Department to unilaterally implement inflation indexing for capital gains, bypassing the need for Congressional approval. This move, if enacted, would reduce the effective tax burden on the sale of long-term assets by adjusting for inflation, potentially stimulating investment activity and impacting government revenue. The core institution involved is the U.S. Treasury.

多源确认
霍尔木兹海峡冻结致布伦特-迪拜价差创多年新高

AI 深度解读
根据ZeroHedge、OilPrice等来源报道，霍尔木兹海峡（Hormuz）的航运冻结事件导致布伦特（Brent）与迪拜（Dubai）原油价差扩大至多年高位。该事件直接冲击了中东原油的运输通道，引发市场对特定区域原油供应中断的担忧，从而推高了与布伦特基准挂钩的原油价格相对于迪拜原油的溢价。
According to sources including ZeroHedge and OilPrice, a shipping freeze in the Strait of Hormuz has driven the Brent-Dubai crude oil spread to a multi-year high. This event directly impacts a key Middle Eastern oil transit route, raising market concerns about supply disruptions for specific regional crudes and consequently widening the premium of Brent-linked oil prices over Dubai crude.
相关标的 原油/Crude Oil美元指数/DXY

上海交通大学X-LANCE实验室的研究人员发布了全球首个统一20多种阿拉伯方言的开源文本转语音（TTS）AI模型“Habibi”。此举被分析师认为将扩大中国在中东地区的技术影响力。该模型由国内顶尖的视听与语言处理研究机构之一主导开发。
Chinese researchers from Shanghai Jiao Tong University's X-LANCE Lab have released Habibi, the world's first open-source text-to-speech model that unifies over 20 Arabic dialects. Analysts view this development as a move poised to expand China's technological influence in the Middle East.

The Federal Reserve issued a consumer alert via its official social media account, warning that scammers are using phishing emails disguised as communications from the Fed. These fraudulent messages employ fake fraud alerts and other scare tactics to steal personal financial information. The post did not specify dates or figures. Its core purpose is for the key financial institution to proactively safeguard its credibility and public financial security by advising vigilance and directing to official guidance.

President Donald J. Trump stated via tweet that tariffs have influenced Novartis and its CEO, Dr. Vasant (Vas) Narasimhan, to build more than 7 manufacturing and R&D facilities in the U.S., creating thousands of jobs. According to Bloomberg, Oracle Corporation and OpenAI have scrapped plans to expand a flagship AI data center campus in Abilene, Texas. Negotiations stalled over financing and OpenAI's "changing needs," widely interpreted as the project's financials no longer making sense. This marks a concrete setback in the AI investment narrative, signaling growing skepticism towards the "AI solves everything" thesis driven by massive capital expenditure.

美国政治与财政/贸易3 Reasons Why Obamacare Is So Hard To Fix
奥巴马医改难以修正的三大原因
ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 2026-03-07 09:05
AI 深度解读
《平价医疗法案》（奥巴马医改）自2014年实施以来问题持续。初期网站故障频发，首年保费即上涨23%。尽管KFF民调显示自2017年起公众支持率转为正面，且2025年覆盖超2400万人，但核心问题未解：12年间保费翻倍，消费者选择有限，设计缺陷浪费税款。同时，保险公司已适应规则，2014至2024年持续盈利，年收入翻倍至1.1万亿美元。
The Affordable Care Act (Obamacare) has faced persistent issues since its 2014 launch, including initial website glitches and a 23% premium hike in its first year. While KFF polls show public favorability since 2017, with over 24 million insured by 2025, core problems remain: premiums have more than doubled over 12 years, consumer choice is limited, and design flaws waste taxpayer money. Insurers have adapted, more than doubling annual revenue to $1.1 trillion and consistently profiting from 2014 to 2024.
相关标的 标普500/SPX美元指数/DXY
中性 对相关标的影响中性：新闻主要分析医改政策长期结构性问题，未直接冲击金融市场或提供明确的短期交易信号。

ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 2026-03-07 07:50
AI 深度解读
美国总统特朗普于周四解雇了国土安全部部长Kristi Noem，并任命俄克拉荷马州参议员Markwayne Mullin接替，这是其第二任期内的首次内阁人事变动。然而，民主党人明确表示，人事变动并未改变其立场，围绕国土安全部预算的僵局仍在持续。该部门部分停摆已进入第三周，民主党坚持要求对移民和海关执法局及海关与边境保护局实施广泛限制，且立场因人事变动而更趋强硬。众议院少数党领袖Hakeem Jeffries强调需要的是政策改变，而非人事调整。
On Thursday, President Donald Trump fired Department of Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem and appointed Sen. Markwayne Mullin of Oklahoma as her replacement, marking the first administration shake-up of his second term. Democrats, however, stated this personnel change did not alter their stance. The standoff over DHS funding continues, with the partial shutdown now in its third week. Their demands for sweeping restrictions on Immigration and Customs Enforcement and Customs and Border Protection remain firm, with House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries emphasizing the need for a policy change, not just a personnel one.

ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 2026-03-07 07:25
AI 深度解读
2026年3月4日，明尼苏达州州长Tim Walz和总检察长Keith Ellison就涉及数十亿美元的欺诈争议，在国会众议院监督与政府改革委员会作证超过四小时。共和党议员重点质询了两位民主党领导人何时获知欺诈、为何事后仍持续付款以及政治因素可能扮演的角色。委员会主席James Comer总结称，举报人被噤声，而欺诈者却发了财。
On March 4, 2026, Minnesota Governor Tim Walz and Attorney General Keith Ellison testified for over four hours before the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform regarding the state's multibillion-dollar fraud controversies. Republican lawmakers focused on when the Democratic leaders were alerted to the fraud, why payments continued afterward, and the potential role of politics. Committee Chairman James Comer summarized the scandal as whistleblowers being silenced while fraudsters got rich.

美国政治与财政/贸易USPS Could Run Out Of Funds Within A Year Without Congressional Action: Postmaster General
邮政总局警告：若无国会行动，资金一年内将耗尽
ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 2026-03-07 06:00
AI 深度解读
美国邮政总局局长David Steiner于3月4日警告，若国会不采取行动，美国邮政服务（USPS）的现金储备可能在一年内耗尽，最早在2027年2月将无法支付员工和供应商款项。USPS是一家主要依靠邮资收入运营的独立机构，2025财年净亏损90亿美元，2024财年净亏损95亿美元。其核心诉求是国会解除数十年来的借款上限，以获取更多资金。
On March 4, U.S. Postal Service Postmaster General David Steiner warned that USPS could run out of cash reserves within a year without Congressional action, risking inability to pay employees and vendors as early as February 2027. USPS, an independent agency funded primarily by postage revenue, reported a $9 billion net loss for fiscal year 2025 and a $9.5 billion loss in 2024. Its key request is for Congress to remove a decades-old borrowing cap to secure more funding.
相关标的 美元指数/DXY美国国债/US Treasury Bonds

ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 2026-03-07 03:40
AI 深度解读
美国国务院全球公共事务局助理国务卿迪伦·约翰逊于3月5日声明，自2月28日伊朗冲突爆发以来，已有近20,000名美国公民从中东安全返回。该数字不包括已安全转移至其他国家或仍在返美途中的公民。在国务卿马可·卢比奥指示下，国务院包机及地面运输行动正在进行并将增加。
In a March 5 statement, Dylan Johnson, assistant secretary at the Bureau of Global Public Affairs, stated that nearly 20,000 U.S. citizens have safely returned from the Middle East since the Iran conflict broke out on Feb. 28. This figure excludes those relocated to other countries or still in transit. At the direction of Secretary Marco Rubio, State Department charter flights and ground transport operations are underway and ramping up.

美国总统特朗普于2026年3月6日接受CNN采访时宣称，古巴共产主义政权将很快垮台，并计划派遣参议员马可·鲁比奥（Marco Rubio）前往。特朗普政府数月来持续推动颠覆哈瓦那政权，近期古巴全国性停电加剧了危机。分析警告，特朗普对古巴的燃料封锁可能导致该国燃料储备在3月中下旬耗尽，使全岛陷入瘫痪。
On March 6, 2026, President Trump stated in a CNN interview that Cuba's communist regime will "fall pretty soon" and he intends to "place Marco over there," referring to Senator Marco Rubio. The Trump administration has been working for months to topple the Havana regime, with worsening nationwide blackouts in Cuba this week. Analysts warn Trump's fuel blockade could deplete Cuba's fuel reserves by mid- to late March, leading to complete paralysis.

OilPrice-能源市场 2026-03-04 04:48
AI 深度解读
当地时间周二凌晨4点左右，一艘受美国和英国制裁的俄罗斯液化天然气（LNG）运输船“Arctic Metagaz”号在地中海马耳他与利比亚之间海域发生爆炸并起火。据路透社和马耳他时报报道，船员在发生一系列爆炸后被救起并转移至附近船只，其命运最初不明。这是首例受制裁的俄罗斯LNG船在关键航道发生此类事件。
Early Tuesday around 4 a.m. local time, the Russian-flagged LNG tanker "Arctic Metagaz," under U.S. and UK sanctions, caught fire following an explosion in the Mediterranean between Malta and Libya. According to Reuters and the Times of Malta, a series of explosions occurred before the crew was rescued and transferred to another vessel, with their initial fate unclear. This marks a first-of-its-kind incident involving a sanctioned Russian LNG carrier in a key shipping lane.

知名经济学家彼得·希夫通过其官方推特账号转发@SchiffGold的观点，核心论点为：市场终将修正政策造成的扭曲，无论是住房市场还是通货膨胀。希夫强调现实规律终将胜出，并暗示黄金矿业公司可能因此受益。该推文未提及具体时间、数字或机构名称，主要传达其长期持有的对政府干预市场的批判立场以及对黄金作为避险资产的看好。
Economist Peter Schiff retweeted a post from @SchiffGold, asserting that markets ultimately correct distortions caused by policies, ranging from housing to inflation. Schiff emphasizes that reality always prevails and suggests gold miners may benefit. The tweet contains no specific dates, figures, or institutional names, serving primarily to reiterate his critical stance on government intervention and bullish outlook on gold as a hedge.

According to a breaking tweet from KobeissiLetter, spot gold has fallen below $5,100 per ounce and silver below $78 per ounce, despite rapidly rising global uncertainty. Notably, silver prices have dropped by $20 per ounce, or 21%, within a 24-hour period. This price action contradicts the typical expectation of precious metals rising as safe-haven assets during periods of turmoil, suggesting potential strong technical selling or liquidity pressures in the market.

According to a social media post by key figure Peter Schiff, gold and silver prices have reached historic highs as of 2026. Gold closed up $94 at $5,278, marking its highest weekly and monthly close ever. Silver closed up $5.50 at $93.66, achieving its highest monthly close on record. Year-to-date in 2026, gold has risen 21.5% and silver 30%. In sharp contrast, Bitcoin has declined 27%, highlighting a significant divergence in performance.

Clinton claimed his brief acquaintance with Epstein ended years before the crimes came to light.

U.S. Customs and Border Protection official Brandon Lord stated in a court filing that a system to process refunds for tariffs imposed under President Donald Trump, which were ruled illegal, will be ready within 45 days. Government lawyers are meeting with a federal trade judge to establish a broad settlement process for returning approximately $166 billion in tariff payments to around 330,000 importers.

AI 深度解读
根据国际研究期刊《Advanced Engineering Hub》的报告，雇主正越来越多地使用涉及生成式AI的申请人追踪系统（ATS）进行招聘筛选。Jobscan分析显示，去年近98%的《财富》500强公司使用了某种类型的ATS。Select Software Reviews的研究发现，70%的大型公司依赖此类系统。这标志着AI已成为求职者必须跨越的关键门槛。
According to a report from the International Research Journal on Advanced Engineering Hub, employers are increasingly using applicant tracking systems (ATS) that involve generative AI for hiring screening. A Jobscan analysis indicates that nearly 98% of Fortune 500 companies used some type of ATS last year. Research from Select Software Reviews found that 70% of large companies rely on such systems. This signifies AI has become a critical threshold job seekers must cross.

AI 深度解读
美国劳工统计局于北京时间周五（具体日期原文未提供）公布的4月非农就业数据远逊预期，仅新增17.5万人，大幅低于预期的24.3万人。同时，失业率意外升至3.9%，平均时薪增速放缓。这份疲软的报告削弱了市场对美联储维持高利率的预期，导致美元走软、美债收益率下跌，从而直接推动了黄金和白银价格的上涨。
Gold and silver prices rose following the release of weaker-than-expected U.S. jobs data. The Bureau of Labor Statistics reported that nonfarm payrolls increased by only 175,000 in April, significantly below the forecast of 243,000, while the unemployment rate unexpectedly rose to 3.9% and wage growth slowed. This downbeat report tempered expectations for the Federal Reserve to maintain higher interest rates for longer, leading to a weaker U.S. dollar and lower Treasury yields, which boosted demand for precious metals.

Spot gold prices rallied near session highs following the release of U.S. retail sales data for January 2024, which showed a decline of 0.2% month-over-month, missing the expected 0.2% increase. The weaker-than-expected consumer spending data fueled market speculation that the Federal Reserve might adopt a more dovish monetary policy stance, reducing the opportunity cost of holding non-yielding gold and providing support for its price.

Kitco-贵金属 2026-03-06 11:41
AI 深度解读
Kitco报道，现货黄金价格反弹至每盎司5130美元。这一反弹与美国劳工部公布的周度失业金申请人数数据直接相关。数据显示，截至数据发布当周，美国初请失业金人数维持在21.3万人的低位，表明劳动力市场依然紧张。这一数据强化了市场对美联储可能维持高利率以对抗通胀的预期，通常这会打压无息资产黄金。然而，金价在数据公布后不跌反升，可能反映了市场在数据公布前的过度悲观预期被修正，或存在其他避险买盘支撑。
Spot gold rebounded to $5,130 per ounce following the release of U.S. weekly jobless claims data. The U.S. Department of Labor reported that initial jobless claims held steady at 213,000 for the week, indicating continued tightness in the labor market. This data typically reinforces expectations that the Federal Reserve will maintain higher interest rates to combat inflation, which is usually negative for non-yielding gold. The subsequent price rebound may suggest a market correction from overly pessimistic pre-data positioning or the presence of other supportive factors like safe-haven demand.
相关标的 黄金/Gold美元指数/DXY
中性 对黄金影响中性：强劲就业数据本应利空黄金，但金价反弹显示市场解读复杂，多空因素交织。

China is intensifying efforts to establish Hong Kong as a gold hub through major moves involving public and private miners and new market infrastructure. 贵金属（黄金/白银/铂金）Platinum market set for fourth consecutive annual deficit as tight supply supports investment case
铂金市场将连续第四年短缺，供应紧张支撑投资逻辑
Kitco-贵金属 2026-03-06 11:41
AI 深度解读
根据世界铂金投资协会（WPIC）的最新报告，全球铂金市场预计在2024年出现连续第四年的供应短缺，赤字规模为4.5万盎司。这一预测基于南非主要矿山供应持续紧张，而汽车催化剂和工业领域的需求保持韧性。持续的供应缺口为铂金的投资价值提供了基本面支撑。
According to the latest report from the World Platinum Investment Council (WPIC), the global platinum market is projected to face its fourth consecutive annual deficit in 2024, with a shortfall of 45,000 ounces. This forecast is driven by persistently tight supply from major South African mines, coupled with resilient demand from the automotive catalyst and industrial sectors. The ongoing supply deficit underpins the fundamental investment case for platinum.

贵金属（黄金/白银/铂金）Central bank gold demand drops 82% from 2025 average in January, but sovereign demand base broadens – World Gold Council
世界黄金协会：1月央行购金量较2025年均值降82%，但主权需求基础拓宽
Kitco-贵金属 2026-03-04 10:08
AI 深度解读
世界黄金协会（World Gold Council）数据显示，2025年1月全球央行黄金需求同比2024年1月下降82%，远低于2025年的季度平均水平。尽管月度数据大幅下滑，但报告指出，主权需求的基础正在扩大，更多国家的央行参与了黄金购买。关键数据为82%的降幅和2025年1月的时间点。
According to the World Gold Council, central bank gold demand in January 2025 fell by 82% compared to January 2024, significantly below the quarterly average for 2025. Despite the sharp monthly decline, the report notes that the base of sovereign demand is broadening, with more central banks participating in gold purchases. Key figures are the 82% drop and the timeframe of January 2025.

美国供应管理协会（ISM）于北京时间晚间公布，4月制造业采购经理人指数（PMI）为52.4，低于前值57.1。数据公布后，现货黄金价格迅速下跌，交易于时段低点附近。该数据表明美国制造业扩张速度放缓，但仍在荣枯线50上方，市场解读为经济虽存韧性但增长动能减弱。
Spot gold traded near its session low after the Institute for Supply Management (ISM) reported that its Manufacturing PMI for April came in at 52.4, a significant drop from the previous reading of 57.1. The data, indicating a slowdown in the pace of U.S. manufacturing expansion though still above the 50 threshold, triggered a swift sell-off in the precious metal.

As President Donald Trump declares inflation tamed, the escalating conflict involving Iran threatens a new spike in prices. This potential price pressure could undermine the president's central case for advocating lower interest rates. US Treasury-财政部新闻 2026-02-28 17:09
AI 深度解读
美国财政部下属的财政服务局（Bureau of the Fiscal Service, BFS）发布新闻。该机构隶属于美国财政部，负责联邦政府的财政运营、支付服务、债务管理及政府账户报告等核心职能。此新闻本身为机构常规信息发布，未包含具体政策、数据或时间节点，因此不涉及市场敏感信息或明确的政策变动。
The Bureau of the Fiscal Service (BFS), an agency under the U.S. Department of the Treasury, has issued a news release. The BFS is responsible for the federal government's fiscal operations, payment services, debt management, and government account reporting. This news itself is a routine institutional announcement, containing no specific policy details, data, or timelines, and thus does not involve market-sensitive information or explicit policy changes.
中性 该新闻为美国财政部下属机构的常规信息发布，未包含任何可能直接影响市场的具体政策、数据或操作，因此对各类金融标的影响为中性。

AI 深度解读
美国财政部宣布将于2024年5月28日、29日和30日分别拍卖2年期、5年期和7年期国债，总计规模为1830亿美元。此次拍卖是财政部常规融资活动的一部分，旨在为政府支出筹集资金。拍卖结果将直接影响国债市场供需，并可能对市场利率和流动性产生短期冲击。
The US Treasury Department announced auctions of 2-year, 5-year, and 7-year Treasury notes totaling $183 billion, scheduled for May 28, 29, and 30, 2024, respectively. These are part of the Treasury's regular financing operations to fund government expenditures. The auction outcomes will directly impact Treasury supply and demand, potentially causing short-term volatility in market interest rates and liquidity.

The U.S. Treasury Department has released official information regarding Savings Bonds. Savings Bonds are low-risk, non-marketable Treasury securities issued by the U.S. government, designed to provide a safe savings vehicle for individual investors. This news is a routine product description and does not contain new data such as specific issuance dates, interest rates, or amounts, constituting a basic policy information release.

经过13个月的联合监控，美国联邦机构与魁北克警方于昨日（新闻发布日）逮捕了四名嫌疑人，他们涉嫌通过暗网向美国消费者走私比芬太尼致命100倍的新一代合成阿片类药物。去年12月，当局查获了超过60万片合成毒品。该网络据称与涉及不列颠哥伦比亚省芬太尼超级实验室、伊朗有组织犯罪及锡那罗亚贩毒集团的“狼群联盟”有关。
Following 13 months of joint surveillance, U.S. federal agencies and Quebec police arrested four suspects yesterday for allegedly exporting next-generation synthetic opioids 100 times deadlier than fentanyl to American consumers via the dark web. In December, authorities seized over 600,000 tablets of synthetic drugs. The network is reportedly linked to the Wolfpack Alliance, which sources connect to a British Columbia fentanyl superlab, Iranian organized crime, and the Sinaloa Cartel.

文章源自RealInvestmentAdvice.com的Lance Roberts，发布于ZeroHedge。核心驳斥了“法币将死”及美元因央行“印钞”而大幅贬值的流行叙事。作者指出，尽管自1966年以来美元购买力据称下降了90%的图表常被用于支持“贬值论”，并以此推销黄金、白银等资产，但该叙事多贩卖恐惧而非事实。文章旨在澄清对美元贬值的过度恐慌。
Authored by Lance Roberts via RealInvestmentAdvice.com and published on ZeroHedge, the article critically examines the popular "fiat is dying" narrative. It challenges the claim that central bank money printing has led to severe U.S. dollar debasement, rendering it obsolete. The author argues that while risks exist, the narrative often sells fear, using charts like the one showing a 90% loss in dollar purchasing power since 1966 to promote gold, silver, or other assets, rather than presenting a balanced factual analysis.

宏观经济综合California May Flip 50-Year Nuclear Moratorium
加州可能推翻50年核能禁令
ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 2026-03-07 11:10
AI 深度解读
加州可能推翻其长达50年的核能禁令。彭博社报道，由于AI数据中心带来的电力需求激增，以及实现2035年90%、2045年100%清洁电力的激进气候目标面临挑战，该州1976年实施的禁令出现松动迹象。民主党议员Lisa Calderon上月提出的第2647号议会法案是核心进展，该法案将豁免2005年后获美国核管理委员会许可的“先进核反应堆”不受禁令限制。此举旨在将核能作为可靠低碳能源的选项，与美国国内核能兴趣复兴趋势一致。
California may overturn its 50-year moratorium on nuclear power. Bloomberg reports cracks are appearing in the state's 1976 ban, driven by surging electricity demand from AI data centers and the challenge of meeting aggressive climate targets (90% clean electricity by 2035, 100% by 2045). The key development is Assembly Bill 2647, introduced last month by Democratic Assembly Member Lisa Calderon with Republican co-sponsors. The bill would exempt "advanced nuclear reactors" (systems licensed by the Nuclear Regulatory Commission since 2005) from the prohibition, keeping nuclear as an option for reliable, low-carbon power, aligning with broader U.S. nuclear resurgence.
相关标的 铀/Uranium公用事业板块/Utilities Sector (XLU)加州本地电力公司/California-based Utilities

FOMC/美联储Bad Faith Noncompliance: Virginia Schools Flout Supreme Court And Trump With DEI 'Rebrand'
恶意违规：弗吉尼亚州学校通过DEI"重塑"藐视最高法院与特朗普
ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 2026-03-07 06:40
AI 深度解读
核心事件为美国弗吉尼亚州学校对最高法院裁决及特朗普行政令的“阳奉阴违”。关键时间点包括：特朗普第一任期签署第13950号行政令（禁止基于种族的歧视性概念）；2023年6月，最高法院在“学生公平录取组织诉哈佛大学案”中裁定，以多样性为由实施种族偏好录取属歧视且违法；此后一年，特朗普又签署两项行政令，禁止联邦政府及其承包商（含高校）推行DEI意识形态，旨在恢复择优原则。然而，相关学校正通过“重新包装”规避合规。
The core event involves Virginia schools engaging in "bad faith noncompliance" by rebranding DEI initiatives to circumvent legal mandates. Key milestones include: President Trump's Executive Order 13950 during his first term, banning divisive race-based concepts; the Supreme Court's June 2023 ruling in Students for Fair Admissions v. Harvard, which deemed racial preferences for diversity unlawful; and two subsequent executive orders issued just over a year ago that banned DEI ideology in federal contracting and sought to restore merit-based systems. Schools are now attempting to bypass these requirements through rebranding.
相关标的 美元指数/DXY美国国债/US Treasury

On March 6, 2026, incumbent Texas Republican Congressman Tony Gonzales, embroiled in a sex scandal, announced he would not seek re-election, handing the GOP nomination to YouTube gun personality Brandon Herrera, known as the 'AK Guy'. If Herrera wins in November, he could become a target of AIPAC and other pro-Israel organizations, potentially bringing a Republican to Congress who feels no need to pander to Israel and its U.S. supporters.

Kitco分析指出，本周金价受地缘政治风险与宏观经济因素双向拉扯。一方面，中东紧张局势（如以色列-哈马斯冲突）及俄罗斯-乌克兰战争引发的避险需求为金价提供支撑。另一方面，美国强劲的经济数据（如非农就业）和持续的通胀压力，强化了市场对美联储将维持高利率更长时间的预期，这增加了持有黄金的机会成本，对金价构成压制。
Kitco analysis indicates that gold prices were pulled in opposite directions by geopolitical risks and macroeconomic factors this week. Geopolitical tensions, including the Israel-Hamas conflict and the Russia-Ukraine war, provided support through safe-haven demand. Conversely, strong U.S. economic data (e.g., nonfarm payrolls) and persistent inflation reinforced market expectations that the Federal Reserve will maintain higher interest rates for longer, increasing the opportunity cost of holding gold and exerting downward pressure on prices.

Kitco Metals reported that platinum prices declined in trading on Friday, April 12, 2024. Specifically, the front-month platinum futures contract on the New York Mercantile Exchange (NYMEX) fell 1.5% to settle at $965 per ounce. The drop was primarily pressured by a stronger U.S. dollar and market expectations that the Federal Reserve will maintain high interest rates. The U.S. Dollar Index (DXY) rose 0.3% on the day, diminishing the appeal of dollar-denominated platinum. Concurrently, robust U.S. economic data reinforced the view that rates would stay higher for longer, increasing the opportunity cost of holding the non-yielding asset platinum.

Sprott的Paul Wong：世界分崩离析之际需货币储备体系，布雷顿森林体系III不可避免且黄金独树一帜
Kitco-贵金属 2026-02-28 17:09
AI 深度解读
Sprott公司的市场策略师Paul Wong在Kitco采访中提出，随着地缘政治紧张和全球体系分化，现有以美元为中心的布雷顿森林体系II正面临压力。他认为，向一个可能由黄金等硬资产支撑的布雷顿森林体系III过渡是不可避免的。在此背景下，黄金作为非主权、无对手方风险的货币储备资产，其地位将愈发凸显。
In an interview with Kitco, Paul Wong, market strategist at Sprott, argues that the current US dollar-centric Bretton Woods II system is under strain due to geopolitical tensions and global fragmentation. He believes a transition to a Bretton Woods III system, potentially backed by hard assets like gold, is inevitable. In this context, gold's role as a non-sovereign, counterparty-risk-free monetary reserve asset is set to become increasingly prominent.

AI 深度解读

According to Wolf Street, U.S. services PPI inflation surged, and goods PPI also jumped significantly, primarily due to companies passing tariff costs to each other. Despite sharp declines in food and energy prices, core services inflation pressure intensified. This trend will further fuel the acceleration of the Fed-favored PCE Price Index, strengthening market expectations for the Federal Reserve to maintain tight monetary policy.

FOMC/美联储Are You Being Watched By Smart Glasses? Here's How To Check
你正被智能眼镜监控吗？检查方法在此
ZeroHedge - 宏观风险预警 2026-02-28 12:00
Are You Being Watched By Smart Glasses? Here's How To Check Meta's Ray-Bans are seeing growing adoption among everyday consumers, highlighting an affordability sweet spot for AI-powered wearables as Apple is expected to enter the space with its own smart glasses following its failed Vision Pro launch. Yet, as AI-powered glasses gain popularity, they introduce new privacy and security concerns, with one smartphone app emerging as an early countermeasure. As first reported by tech blog 404 Media , the new smartphone app Nearby Glasses scans the Bluetooth signature emitted by smart glasses and sends a push notification to the user if a device is detected nearby. " I consider it to be a tiny part of resistance against surveillance tech ," the app's developer, Yves Jeanrenaud, told 404 Media. The emergence of this app comes as we've been highlighting that mass adoption of smart glasses is in its early stages; it is happening now, and we've already mapped the supply chain tied to how to profit from the explosion of these glasses (as well as highlighted Meta's supplier) . But alongside that adoption curve comes a series of risks, from surveillance concerns to child safety issues. Simply put, not everyone wants to be recorded. "This is a tech solution to a social problem exaggerated by technology. I do not want to promote tech solutionism, nor do I want people to feel falsely secure. It's still imperfect," Jeanrenaud said. Remember when Apple had to start warning everyone about AirTags around them? Well, Tim Cook may eventually have to roll out a similar update for smart glasses if there's enough public uproar. Tyler Durden Fri, 02/27/2026 - 23:00
